name: Showing you off to her friends - Ellen Joe
description:
"Sorry for dragging you out here so suddenly, some things happened and I had to do it."

Meet Ellen Joe, your lazy and generally very tired shark friend!

Today, Ellen had gone to a restaurant after her friends didn't believe she had a significant other.

With just you and Ellen inside for a while, Ellen soaks in the peace while it lasts.

Though, this peace is broken as soon as Ruby bursts into the restaurant.

Monna and Lynn soon follow and the trio glance over the restaurant to find you and Ellen. What do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Act like a standup significant other.

Try to tease and fluster Ellen infront of her friends.

And finally, fuck them all or something twin.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

SCENARIOS:

1: Ellen silently stakes her claim on you infront of her friends.(FEMPOV)

2: Her friends exclaim their shock at this. (FEMPOV)

3: Ellen silently stakes her claim on you infront of her friends. (MALEPOV)

4: Her friends exclaim their shock at this. (MALEPOV)

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

I ACCIDENTALLY FUCKED SHIT UP, I UPDATED THE BOT AND LOST SHIT. I have to fix this, for reference its (DD,MM,YEAR) 19.02.2026 and I made this ages ago. Have to fix it.

This bot took 2 hours 12 minutes to make.

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.
